title: NBA Finals Four Heroes Illustration Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: NBA Finals Four Heroes Illustration Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable NBA Finals four-heroes illustration poster with controlled variables. Build it as an editorial Knicks Game 4 hotspot poster. Trend fact guard: Knicks lead 3-1, one win away; Jose Alvarado is used as the Game 4 bench-spark fourth man. Subject Lock: Jalen Brunson, Knicks number 11, floor general, OG Anunoby, Knicks number 8, putback finisher, Karl-Anthony Towns, Knicks number 32, frontcourt anchor, Jose Alvarado, Knicks number 0, bench spark and pressure guard Theme: explosive Knicks four-hero NBA Finals illustration poster Visual recipe: adapted from sports illustration poster language: giant portrait, action figures, explosive paint splashes, ink strokes, team colors, premium collectible artwork Main Subjects: recognizable Jalen Brunson, OG Anunoby, Karl-Anthony Towns, and Jose Alvarado in authentic Knicks uniforms Composition: Brunson as largest central portrait; OG in dynamic putback action near the rim; Towns as powerful frontcourt/rebound presence; Jose as smaller intense spark figure Action System: Brunson dribble or stepback creation, OG putback tip-in, Towns paint presence, Jose defensive pressure or fastbreak spark Typography: KNICKS IN 5, NEW YORK NEVER QUIT, 29 POINT COMEBACK, 3-1 SERIES LEAD, ONE WIN FROM '73 Brand Elements: Knicks logo/wordmark, NBA Finals 2026 mark, Madison Square Garden, orange/blue/white color system Negative Constraints: no wrong player count, no generic players, no wrong jersey numbers, no already-champion wording, no unreadable text Variant focus: Nba Finals Knicks Four Heroes Illustration Poster V1 Final. Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
